mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_payment" (username, gym_id, installment, pay_price, pay_date, pay_name, data_id) VALUES (#{username}, #{gymId}, #{installment}, #{payPrice}, #{payDate}, #{payName}, #{dataId})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.pay_id as payId, p.username, p.gym_id as gymId, p.installment, p.pay_price as payPrice, p.pay_date as payDate, p.pay_name as payName, p.data_id as dataId, hp.coupon_id as couponId, ct.coupon_name as couponName, CASE WHEN hp.coupon_id IS NOT NULL THEN (d.amount - p.pay_price) ELSE NULL END as discountAmount FROM "h_payment" p LEFT JOIN "h_pay" hp ON p.data_id = hp.data_id LEFT JOIN "h_coupon" hc ON hp.coupon_id = hc.coupon_id LEFT JOIN "h_coupon_type" ct ON hc.coupon_num = ct.coupon_num LEFT JOIN "h_contract_data" d ON p.data_id = d.data_id WHERE p.gym_id = (SELECT gym_id FROM "h_member" WHERE username = #{username})
AND TO_CHAR(p.pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{pager.month}
AND (p.pay_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pager.searchKeyword}, '%') OR CAST(p.username AS TEXT) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pager.searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.pay_date DESC, p.pay_id DESC
SELECT pay_id as payId, username, gym_id as gymId, installment, pay_price as payPrice, pay_date as payDate, pay_name as payName, data_id as dataId FROM "h_payment" WHERE pay_id = #{payId}

SELECT d.data_id as dataId, d.contract, d.gym_id as gymId, d.sender_id as senderId, d.receiver_id as receiverId, d.receiver_name as receiverName, d.status, d.start_date as startDate, d.end_date as endDate, d.amount, d.quantity, d.issue_date as issueDate, d.signed_at as signedAt, d.manager_id as managerId FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.sender_id = #{username} AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND d.contract IN (3, 4, 5) AND d.data_id NOT IN ( SELECT data_id FROM "h_payment" WHERE data_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY d.issue_date DESC, d.data_id DESC
